# 修復管線重複執行與狀態管理異常 (Pipeline State & Router Fix)

> **Date:** 2026-05-29
> **Session ID:** `32729395`

---

## 1. Implementation Plan

# 修復管線重複執行與狀態管理異常 (Pipeline State & Router Fix)

經過深度的系統狀態診斷，我已經確認了導致「之前跑完的檔案現在又變成 ⏳」的兩大底層原因：

## 核心問題分析

1. **舊版 `StateManager` 的副檔名配對 Bug**：之前 `StateManager` 在掃描檔案時，漏掉了萬用字元（例如只找 `".m4a"` 而不是 `"*.m4a"`），導致 `audio_transcriber` 當初執行時，**根本沒有把進度寫入 `.pipeline_state.json`**。今天稍早我修復了這個 UI Bug 後，系統終於「看到」了這些檔案，但因為 JSON 裡面沒有紀錄，所以系統把它們當成「更新/新增」的未處理檔案。
2. **`RouterAgent` 的檔案移動 (Move) 機制**：當管線跑完時，`RouterAgent` 使用 `os.rename` 將檔案從 `output` 目錄**剪下並貼上**到了下一個 Skill 的 `input` 目錄（現在檔案確實都在 `smart_highlighter/input` 裡，代表當初真的有跑完！）。這導致 `audio_transcriber` 的 `output` 資料夾變成空的。如果 `StateManager` 嘗試驗證輸出檔案的 Hash，就會判定「輸出檔遺失」，進而把狀態強行退回 `⏳`。

`doc_parser` 因為當初的副檔名設定剛好避開了 Bug，加上目前還沒有後續管線把它的輸出檔移走，所以狀態依然是正常的 `✅`。

---

## Proposed Changes

### 1. `core/orchestration/router_agent.py`
將檔案傳遞機制從「移動 (Move)」改為「複製 (Copy)」。這樣各個 Skill 的 `output` 目錄會保留原始結果，讓 `StateManager` 能夠正確核對 Hash 並維持 `✅` 狀態。

#### [MODIFY] router_agent.py
- 在 `dispatch()` 中將 `os.rename(manifest.source_path, target_path)` 改為 `shutil.copy2(manifest.source_path, target_path)`
- 在 `_on_pipeline_completed()` 中將 `os.rename(filepath, target_path)` 改為 `shutil.copy2(filepath, target_path)`

### 2. 狀態手動修復指令碼 (One-off Script)
為了避免你重新跑已經完成的語音轉錄，我會寫一個一次性的小指令碼 `fix_state.py`。
- 掃描 `data/smart_highlighter/input` 中的 `.md` 檔案，反推哪些 `audio_transcriber` 的音檔已經處理完畢。
- 直接將 `data/audio_transcriber/state/.pipeline_state.json` 裡對應的任務狀態強行標記為 `✅`，這樣系統就不會再把它們拿去重新執行了。

---

## User Review Required

> [!IMPORTANT]
> 改為 `shutil.copy2` (複製) 會讓硬碟空間消耗加倍（因為檔案會在前一個 `output` 和下一個 `input` 各存一份）。如果您的硬碟空間吃緊，我們也可以考慮改用**硬連結 (Hardlink)** `os.link`。不過這需要您的作業系統與檔案系統支援。
> **請問您希望使用標準的檔案複製 (Copy)，還是可以嘗試使用硬連結 (Hardlink) 來節省空間？**

## Verification Plan

### Manual Verification
1. 執行狀態修復腳本後，打開 Telegram Bot 儀表板，確認 `audio_transcriber` 的狀態恢復為完成 (`✅`)。
2. 啟動 `check_status.py` 檢查終端機輸出，確認沒有「輸出檔遺失」的警告。


---

## 2. Walkthrough / Summary

# 管線狀態修復與檔案路由更新 (Walkthrough)

我已經成功修復了管線重複執行與狀態顯示的異常，並將檔案傳遞機制更新為硬連結 (`hardlink`)，以達到你要求的節省空間。

## 做了哪些變更？

### 1. 更新檔案傳遞機制 (`RouterAgent`)
為了避免前一個階段的輸出檔案被「移動」後導致 `StateManager` 判定「檔案遺失」，我修改了核心的路由邏輯：
- **實作路徑**：`core/orchestration/router_agent.py`
- **變更機制**：將 `os.rename()` 替換為 `os.link()`。
- **Fallback 機制**：考量到硬連結有時會因為跨磁碟分割區而失敗，我也加入了一層安全防護。如果 `os.link()` 拋出錯誤，會自動降級為標準的 `shutil.copy2()`，確保管線絕不會因此中斷。

### 2. 修復歷史任務狀態 (`StateManager`)
由於之前的副檔名掃描 Bug 以及 `RouterAgent` 搬空檔案的影響，`audio_transcriber` 的進度被誤判為遺失或未處理。
- **反向追蹤**：我寫了一支小程式 (`fix_state.py`)，它掃描了目前位在 `smart_highlighter/input` 中的最終成果檔。
- **強行標記**：程式利用這些成果檔反向推導出哪些語音檔 (`L14-1.m4a` 等) 其實早就完成了，並強行修改了 `data/audio_transcriber/state/.pipeline_state.json` 的紀錄。

## 驗證結果

目前，你可以打開 Telegram 儀表板 (`/status`) 或是終端機的進度總表 (`checklist.md`)。你會發現：
- 所有之前完成的音檔已經重新顯示為綠色勾勾 `✅`。
- 狀態備註會清楚註明：**✅ 已手動修復 (從後續管線回推)**。
- 系統現在不會再把這批已經處理好的檔案拿去重複執行了！

> [!TIP]
> 因為我們使用了 `os.link`，未來所有處理完畢的檔案在不同資料夾間（例如從 `audio_transcriber/output` 到 `proofreader/input`）都會共用同一個實體檔案空間，這將會為你的硬碟省下可觀的容量。


---

## 3. Tasks Executed

# 修復管線重複執行與狀態管理異常 (Task)

- `[x]` 1. 修改 `RouterAgent` 檔案傳遞機制
  - `[x]` 將 `RouterAgent.dispatch()` 中的 `os.rename` 改為 `os.link`，並加入 fallback `shutil.copy2`
  - `[x]` 將 `RouterAgent._on_pipeline_completed()` 中的 `os.rename` 改為 `os.link`，並加入 fallback
- `[x]` 2. 修復 `audio_transcriber` 歷史狀態
  - `[x]` 撰寫 `fix_state.py` 掃描 `smart_highlighter/input`
  - `[x]` 更新 `.pipeline_state.json` 將已完成檔案強制標記為 `✅`
  - `[x]` 執行腳本並確認狀態
- `[x]` 3. 驗證與完結

  - `[x]` 撰寫 Walkthrough

Run `ops/check.sh` and `pytest tests/` to verify code correctness.\n20:     2. Update any related `.md` files (`ARCHITECTURE.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, etc.) to reflect the changes.\n21:     3. Run `git add -A`, `git commit -m \"...\"`, and `git push` to GitHub.\n22: - Frequently annotates via artifact comments instead of text messages\n23: - Gives feedback mid-execution using inline comment annotations on the plan\n24: - Switches between Chinese and English freely; code and docs should always be in English\n25: - Uses `Continue` / `繼續` as the signal to proceed after plan approval — never re-explains\n26: \n27: ### Decision-making patterns\n28: - Reviews implementation plans via art\n<truncated 4648 bytes>\ntent\n92: - Do NOT update `HANDOFF.md` without updating the timestamp and session focus\n93: - Do NOT mark a task complete in `TASKS.md` without verifying it is actually done\n94: \n95: ### AI behaviour prohibitions\n96: - Do NOT ignore artifact comments — they are the primary feedback channel\n97: - Do NOT re-explain the plan after the user says `繼續` — just execute\n98: - Do NOT ask permission for safe read-only operations (ls, cat, grep, git status)\n99: - Do NOT produce mega commits that mix unrelated changes\n100: \n101: ---\n102: \n103: ## AI Agent Master Startup Sequence (Mandatory)\n104: \n105: > [!IMPORTANT]\n106: > **To any AI Agent reading this:** You have been instructed to read this `AI_PROFILE.md` as your initial context. To safely operate this repository, you **MUST** read the following files in this exact order to build your full memory context before making any code changes:\n107: \n108: 1. **`memory/STARTUP.md`**: The canonical startup prompt and full session initialization process. {"step_index":10,"source":"MODEL","type":"VIEW_FILE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T03:42:25Z","content":"Created At: 2026-05-29T03:42:25Z\nCompleted At: 2026-05-29T03:42:25Z\nFile Path: `file:///Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/memory/PROJECT_RULES.md`\nTotal Lines: 99\nTotal Bytes: 7323\nShowing lines 1 to 99\nThe following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.\n1: # System Context & Development Contract\n2: \n3: > **Target Audience:** Development AIs (Google Antigravity, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot)\n4: > **Purpose:** Defines the active hardware constraints, End-of-Feature protocol, and Documentation update rules for the workspace.\n5: > **Last Updated:** 2026-05-22\n6: \n7: ## 1. Environment Constraints & Toolchain (uv-native)\n8: \n9: - **OS**: macOS Apple Silicon\n10: - **Hardware**: 16 GB RAM (Strict memory limits apply — strictly one heavy model at a time. Watchdog evicts models if memory threshold is exceeded. Heavy VLM models like `llama3.2-vision` (7.8GB) force a strict sequential `Semaphore(1)` execution constraint to prevent OOM and API timeouts).\n11: - **Primary Language**: Code in English, Communication in Traditional Chinese.\n12: - **Tech Stack**: Python 3.9+, Ollama, MLX-Whisper, Docling, ChromaDB, LiteLLM, Telegram Bot API\n13: - **Execution Environment**: Headless CLI-first with Ephemeral WebUI gates for Human-in-the-Loop verification.\n14: - **Package & Environment Manager**: `uv` is the EXCLUSIVE Python version and dependency manager.\n15: \n16: ### 1.1 `uv` Workflow & Command Standards (MANDATORY)\n17: 1. **No `pip` or manual `venv`**: Do not use `pip install` or manually activate `.venv`. The project uses `uv` which automatically manages the `.venv`.\n18: 2. **Package Installation**: Use `uv add <package>` to add dependencies (which updates `pyproject.toml` and `uv.lock`).\n19: 3. **Execution**: Always run project scripts using `uv run <file.py>` (e.g., `uv run pytest`). This guarantees execution in the correct isolated \n<truncated 4149 bytes>\nhe full conversation including archival confirmation is captured. Update `memory/HANDOFF.md` & `memory/TASKS.md`.\n72: \n73: > [!IMPORTANT]\n74: > `archive_session.py` MUST run after `git push`, never before. The archival log may miss the final conversation turns if run before pushing.\n75: \n76: ## 6. Architecture Constraints\n77: \n78: - **Proofreader as Intermediate Layer**: The `proofreader` skill must exist as an intermediate bottleneck in the automated pipeline (e.g. between `audio_transcriber` and `smart_highlighter`). It must pause the pipeline execution state rather than block it, and rely on `inbox_daemon` Watchdog triggers to resume downstream chains.\n79: \n80: ---\n81: \n82: ## 7. Code Review Checklist (每次深度審查必跑)\n83: \n84: When performing a full code audit (triggered by \"讀取 AI_PROFILE.md，深度分析...\"), the AI MUST systematically check every item below in addition to running `./ops/check.sh`:\n85: \n86: | # | Check | Command / Method |\n87: |:---:|:---|:---|\n88: | 1 | No bare `print()` in production code | `grep -r \"^print(\" core/ skills/` |\n89: | 2 | No hardcoded file paths | `grep -rn '/data/raw\\|/tmp/openclaw' core/ skills/` |\n90: | 3 | All LLM calls followed by `unload_model()` | Manual review of each `llm.generate()` callsite |\n91: | 4 | All file writes use `AtomicWriter` | `grep -rn \"open(.*[\\\"']w[\\\"']\" core/ skills/` |\n92: | 5 | All config reads go through `config_manager` | `grep -rn \"yaml.load\\|json.load.*config\" core/ skills/` |\n93: | 6 | DRY compliance — no duplicated for-loop logic | Semantic review across Phase scripts |\n94: | 7 | `STRUCTURE.md` matches actual directory tree | `ls` vs documented structure |\n95: | 8 | `HANDOFF.md` timestamp is current | Check `Last Updated` field |\n96: | 9 | No `# TODO` without accompanying issue reference | `grep -rn \"# TODO\" core/ skills/` |\n97: | 10 | All new principles captured and confirmed | Review conversation for `✅ 原則已記錄` markers |\n98: \n99: \nThe above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.\n"}

{"step_index":13,"source":"MODEL","type":"VIEW_FILE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T03:42:25Z","content":"Created At: 2026-05-29T03:42:25Z\nCompleted At: 2026-05-29T03:42:26Z\nFile Path: `file:///Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/memory/DECISIONS.md`\nTotal Lines: 700\nTotal Bytes: 39008\nShowing lines 1 to 700\nThe following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.\n1: # DECISIONS.md — Architectural Decision Records\n2: \n3: > **Rule:** Never delete historical records. If a pattern is deprecated, mark it `[ABANDONED]` and explain why.\n4: > **Granular Logs:** This document records the *why* and *what* of architecture. For the *how* (raw execution logs, implementation plans, AI walkthroughs), refer to **[`HISTORY.md`](HISTORY.md)** and the `memory/sessions/` directory.\n5: \n6: ---\n7: \n8: ## [2026-05-26] ADR-019: Architectural Decoupling of StateManager and RouterAgent\n9: \n10: **Status:** Proposed / Planned\n11: \n12: **Context:** An architectural analysis identified severe coupling in the core framework:\n13: 1. `StateManager` hardcoded the phases (`PHASES_VOICE`, `PHASES_PDF`) and UI labels (`PHASE_LABELS_PDF`) for all 10 skills via a massive `if/elif` block. Adding a new skill required modifying the core engine.\n14: 2. `RouterAgent` hardcoded handoff paths (e.g., `if next_skill == \"proofreader\"`) and hardcoded LLM prompt decomposition names, preventing generic skill chaining.\n15: \n16: **Decision:**\n17: 1. **Decouple StateManager (Phase 1)**: Shift the Single Source of Truth for phase tracking to the individual skill's `SKILL.md` (YAML Frontmatter). The `StateManager` will dynamically load `state_tracking: phases` and `labels` at runtime via `SkillRegistry`.\n18: 2. **Dynamic Routing via Contracts (Phase 2)**: Shift `RouterAgent` from hardcoded skill names to Input/Output Contracts. Skills will declare `io_contracts: consumes: [type], produces: [type]` in `SKILL.md`.\n19: \n20: **Consequences:** \n21: - The core framework will no longer need\n<truncated 38838 bytes>\nes only implementing the phase logic; infrastructure (logging, resume, paths) is inherited automatically. Both skills maintain their unique operational strengths while sharing governance.\n651: \n652: ---\n653: \n654: ---\n655: \n656: ## [2026-04-15] Strict `data/` separation from `skills/`\n657: \n658: **Status:** Active\n659: \n660: **Context:**\n661: Pipeline outputs were previously mixed with source code.\n662: \n663: **Decision:**\n664: All runtime data (inputs, outputs, state, logs) lives exclusively in `data/<skill>/`. Source code in `skills/<skill>/scripts/`. No cross-contamination.\n665: \n666: **Consequences:**\n667: `git clean -fd` on `skills/` is safe. Data directory excluded from git.\n668: \n669: ---\n670: \n671: ---\n672: \n673: ## [2026-04-19] Technology Selection: Long-Polling vs WebSocket/Celery\n674: \n675: **Status:** Abandoned (Reason: -first)\n676: \n677: **Decision:**\n678: Chose **Long-Polling** (frontend polls `/api/rerun/status` every 3 seconds) over Flask-SocketIO or Celery:\n679: \n680: 1. **Flask-SocketIO** requires `gevent`/`eventlet`, incompatible with the Flask dev server, and doubles deployment complexity\n681: 2. **Celery** requires a Redis broker, adding infrastructure dependency; the system is local-first, single-machine\n682: 3. **Long-Polling** was sufficient given the `ExecutionManager` already had a background Worker Thread; latency < 3s met the use case\n683: \n684: **Consequences:**\n685: `GET /api/rerun/status?task=XXX` reads the latest record from `.rerun_state.json`; frontend polls until status transitions from RUNNING/QUEUED to COMPLETE/ERROR.\n686: \n687: ---\n688: \n689: ---\n690: \n691: ## [2026-04-19] Job Queue RAM Protection: maxsize=5\n692: \n693: **Status:** Abandoned (Reason: )\n694: \n695: **Decision:**\n696: `queue.Queue(maxsize=5)` — the 6th queued request returns False, and the caller converts this to an HTTP 409 response.\n697: A single Worker Thread ensures only one LLM subprocess runs at a time.\n698: \n699: ---\n700: \nThe above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.\n"}

When writing artifacts, make sure to follow the artifact formatting guidelines and use github alerts to highlight critical sections.\nIf the user's request does NOT warrant a plan then continue your work WITHOUT making a plan or requesting user feedback.\n</planning_mode>\n<bash_command_reminder>\nCRITICAL INSTRUCTION 1: You may have access to a variety of tools at your disposal. Some tools may be for a specific task such as 'view_file' (for viewing contents of a file). Others may be very broadly applicable such as the ability to run a command on a terminal. Always prioritize using the most specific tool you can for the task at hand. Here are some rules: (a) NEVER run cat inside a bash command to create a new file or append to an existing file. (b) ALWAYS use grep_search instead of running grep inside a bash command unless absolutely needed. (c) DO NOT use ls for listing, cat for viewing, grep for finding, sed for replacing. CRITICAL INSTRUCTION 2: Before making tool calls T, think and explicitly list out any related tools for the task at hand. You can only execute a set of tools T if all other tools in the list are either more generic or cannot be used for the task at hand. ALWAYS START your thought with recalling critical instructions 1 and 2. In particular, the format for the start of your thought block must be '...94>thought\nCRITICAL INSTRUCTION 1: ...\nCRITICAL INSTRUCTION 2: ...'.\n</bash_command_reminder>\n</EPHEMERAL_MESSAGE>"}

{"step_index":19,"source":"MODEL","type":"VIEW_FILE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T03:42:42Z","content":"Created At: 2026-05-29T03:42:42Z\nCompleted At: 2026-05-29T03:42:42Z\nFile Path: `file:///Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`\nTotal Lines: 420\nTotal Bytes: 35796\nShowing lines 1 to 420\nThe following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.\n1: # ARCHITECTURE.md — Global System Architecture\n2: \n3: > **Scope:** Entire `local-workspace/` monorepo\n4: > **Last Updated:** 2026-05-23\n5: > **Audience:** All AI agents and developers operating in this workspace\n6: \n7: ---\n8: \n9: ## System Overview\n10: \n11: `local-workspace/` is a private monorepo that hosts a local AI automation ecosystem on macOS (16 GB RAM, Apple Silicon). It orchestrates several infrastructure services and one primary application sandbox.\n12: \n13: '''\n14: local-workspace/                    ← Monorepo root (git repo)\n15: │\n16: ├── openclaw-sandbox/              ← Primary App: Open Claw AI Automation\n17: │   ├── core/                       ← Shared Python framework (sub-packages below)\n18: │   │   ├── ai/                     ← LLM clients, RAG, vector DB\n19: │   │   ├── cli/                    ← Terminal UI/UX, config wizards, arg parsing\n20: │   │   ├── config/                 ← YAML config managers and validators\n21: │   │   ├── orchestration/          ← RouterAgent, PipelineBase, TaskQueue, EventBus\n22: │   │   ├── services/               ← Background daemons: inbox_daemon, telegram_bot, hitl_manager\n23: │   │   ├── state/                  ← StateManager, ResumeManager, SessionState\n24: │   │   └── utils/                  ← AtomicWriter, PathBuilder, log_manager, bootstrap\n25: │   ├── skills/                     ← 9-skill AI pipeline ecosystem\n26: │   ├── ops/                        ← Sandbox quality gate (check.sh, bo\n<truncated 34227 bytes>\nnal notes into Layer 4 (`student_researcher`, `feynman_simulator`, `academic_edu_assistant`) for deep citation matching, academic traversal, and Socratic debate, funneling outputs into Layer 5.\n408:   - Integrated **Telegram Bypass**: Directly routes `/idea` input from L1 Telegram Bot into L4 `student_researcher` to facilitate quick inspiration incubation and semantic anchoring.\n409: - **student_research Multi-Ingress Funnel (2026-05-22, V9.17)**:\n410:   - Formally established the **Multi-Ingress Funnel** architecture for `student_researcher` (spelled `student_research` by users), allowing it to consume:\n411:     1. **Chat Q&A Markdown files** directly from Ingestion (`data/raw/`).\n412:     2. **Telegram `/idea` inputs** directly from the Telegram bot bypass.\n413:     3. **Clean, verified outputs from the `proofreader`** (after HITL verification in Layer 2).\n414:   - This architecture bypasses any linear processing constraints, ensuring that high-overhead academic validation, claim verification, and semantic conceptual incubation can operate directly on primary sources without intermediate formatting pollution.\n415: - **Coding Guidelines Full Compliance Audit (2026-05-23, V9.17)**:\n416:   - Fixed syntax error (unclosed parenthesis in `super().__init__`) in `gemini_verifier_agent/p01_ai_debate.py` — was causing Ruff/Mypy parse failure.\n417:   - Removed redundant manual `OllamaClient()` instantiation in `knowledge_compiler/p02_extract_graph.py` and `doc_parser/p00b_png_pipeline.py`; both now reuse `self.llm` inherited from `PipelineBase`.\n418:   - Migrated 14 bare `print()` calls in production methods to `self.info/self.error/self.warning/self.log` (§8.1 of CODING_GUIDELINES v4.2.0): `student_researcher/p01_claim_extraction.py` (4), `student_researcher/p02_synthesis.py` (6), `gemini_verifier_agent/p01_ai_debate.py` (4).\n419:   - Quality gate: ✅ Ruff lint, ✅ Ruff format, ✅ Mypy 0 errors (147 files), ✅ 22 tests passed.\n420: \nThe above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.\n"}
{"step_index":20,"source":"MODEL","type":"VIEW_FILE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T03:42:42Z","content":"Created At: 2026-05-29T03:42:42Z\nCompleted At: 2026-05-29T03:42:43Z\nFile Path: `file:///Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/docs/STRUCTURE.md`\nTotal Lines: 433\nTotal Bytes: 23910\nShowing lines 1 to 433\nThe following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.\n1: # Open Claw — Workspace Structure\n2: \n3: > Last Updated: 2026-05-22\n4: > Every file and folder in `openclaw-sandbox/` is documented here.\n5: > Update this file whenever a file is added, removed, or significantly renamed.\n6: \n7: ---\n8: \n9: ## Root Level\n10: \n11: '''text\n12: local-workspace/\n13: ├── docs/                 ← Single Source of Truth (SSoT) Global Docs — contains ARCHITECTURE, STRUCTURE, USER_MANUAL and all core documents\n14: └── openclaw-sandbox/\n15:     ├── AGENTS.md             ← Internal Agent Registry: defines the 9 core skills and RouterAgent\n16:     ├── BOOTSTRAP.md          ← How to bring this workspace to operational state from scratch\n17:     ├── HEARTBEAT.md          ← Known-good state snapshot; updated after each verified stable milestone\n18:     ├── IDENTITY.md           ← Open Claw Runtime Persona: system mission, boundaries, scope of authority\n19:     ├── SOUL.md               ← Open Claw Runtime Ethics: precision, safety, determinism\n20:     ├── TOOLS.md              ← Local endpoints, key paths, env vars, hardware profile\n21:     ├── USER.md               ← Operator profile: preferences, working style, constraints\n22:     │\n23:     ├── pyproject.toml        ← Project metadata + Ruff/Mypy config + all runtime & dev dependencies\n24:     ├── uv.lock               ← Locked dependency tree (managed by uv, never edit manually)\n25:     ├── .gitignore            ← Excludes data/, models/, logs/, __pycache__, .DS_Store\n26:     ├── .pre-commit-confi\n<truncated 22403 bytes>\n **One-off migration scripts must be deleted after use.**\n393: \n394: '''\n395: ops/\n396: ├── bootstrap.sh          ← First-time environment setup: installs uv deps, pre-commit hooks, verifies Ollama\n397: ├── check.sh              ← Full quality gate: uv run ruff lint + format + uv run mypy\n398: │                              Usage: ./ops/check.sh\n399: └── archive_session.py    ← Archives current AI session to memory/sessions/ and updates HISTORY.md\n400: '''\n401: \n402: **Note:** `pyproject.toml`, `.pre-commit-config.yaml` are at the workspace root\n403: (not inside `ops/`) so that Ruff, Mypy, and uv work without extra flags.\n404: `requirements.txt` has been removed — all dependencies are managed via `uv add` / `uv.lock`.\n405: \n406: ---\n407: \n408: ## `models/` — Model Cache (excluded from git)\n409: \n410: '''\n411: models/\n412: ├── hub/models--mlx-community--whisper-large-v3-mlx/   ← MLX Whisper Large v3 (audio_transcriber P1, Apple Silicon)\n413: ├── models--Systran--faster-whisper-medium/             ← Faster-Whisper medium (audio_transcriber P1, fallback)\n414: ├── models--docling-project--docling-layout-heron/      ← Docling layout model (doc_parser P1b, auto-downloaded)\n415: └── models--docling-project--docling-models/            ← Docling recognition models (doc_parser P1b, auto-downloaded)\n416: '''\n417: \n418: > **HF_HOME sandboxed**: `p01_transcribe.py` sets `HF_HOME=<workspace>/models` at runtime to keep all Hugging Face model caches inside the project.\n419: \n420: ---\n421: \n422: ## `logs/` — Service Logs (excluded from git)\n423: \n424: Runtime logs created by `local-workspace/start.sh`.\n425: \n426: '''\n427: logs/\n428: ├── startup.log       ← Start.sh execution log\n429: ├── openclaw.log      ← Open Claw API gateway log\n430: ├── dashboard.log     ← Flask dashboard startup log\n431: └── open-webui.log    ← Open WebUI service log\n432: '''\n433: \nThe above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.\n"}
{"step_index":21,"source":"MODEL","type":"VIEW_FILE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T03:42:43Z","content":"Created At: 2026-05-29T03:42:43Z\nCompleted At: 2026-05-29T03:42:43Z\nFile Path: `file:///Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/docs/CODING_GUIDELINES.md`\nTotal Lines: 849\nTotal Bytes: 33411\nShowing lines 1 to 800\nThe following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.\n1: # Open Claw Engineering Standards\n2: \n3: > **Version:** v4.3.0 (2026-05-26 — Phase 6: System State, VRAM Leaks, & Import Architecture)\n4: > **Scope:** All developers and AI agents operating in `local-workspace/`\n5: > **Tools:** Ruff, Mypy, Shellcheck, pytest\n6: > **Philosophy:** Simple, Robust, Traceable, AI-Friendly\n7: \n8: ---\n9: \n10: ## Table of Contents\n11: \n12: 1. [AI Agent Mandatory Workflow](#1-ai-agent-mandatory-workflow)\n13: 2. [Code Quality Principles](#2-code-quality-principles)\n14: 3. [Architecture & Design](#3-architecture--design)\n15: 4. [Error Handling & Defensive Programming](#4-error-handling--defensive-programming)\n16: 5. [Open Claw-Specific Invariants](#5-open-claw-specific-invariants)\n17: 6. [Python Style & Formatting](#6-python-style--formatting)\n18: 7. [Type Annotations](#7-type-annotations)\n19: 8. [Logging Standards](#8-logging-standards)\n20: 9. [Testing Standards](#9-testing-standards)\n21: 10. [Git & Version Control](#10-git--version-control)\n22: 11. [Security](#11-security)\n23: 12. [Documentation Standards](#12-documentation-standards)\n24: 13. [Prohibited Patterns](#13-prohibited-patterns)\n25: 14. [Quick Reference](#14-quick-reference)\n26: \n27: ---\n28: \n29: ## 1. AI Agent Mandatory Workflow\n30: \n31: > ⚠️ **All AI Agents must complete the following steps in order before executing any task. Skipping any step is a violation.**\n32: \n33: ### Entry Sequence\n34: \n35: '''\n36: 1. Read docs/CODING_GUIDELINES.md  (this file — mandatory)\n37: 2. Read memory/PROJECT_RULES.md                 (project collaboration rules)\n38: 3. Read memory/ARCHI\n<truncated 30398 bytes>\nrsion control | Delete before committing |\n747: | Deleting records from `DECISIONS.md` | Historical context loss | Mark as `[ABANDONED]` |\n748: | `sys.path.insert(0, ...)` | Hacks module resolution | `uv pip install -e .` |\n749: | `self.llm.generate()` unmanaged | Leaks VRAM on crash | `with self.llm_session():` |\n750: \n751: ---\n752: \n753: ## 14. Quick Reference\n754: \n755: ### Run the Quality Gate\n756: \n757: '''bash\n758: # Root-level (all checks: sandbox + infra/pipelines + shell scripts + credential scan)\n759: ./ops/check.sh\n760: \n761: # Sandbox-level (ruff lint + ruff format + mypy)\n762: cd openclaw-sandbox\n763: ./ops/check.sh\n764: \n765: # Run tests\n766: cd openclaw-sandbox\n767: uv run pytest tests/ -q\n768: \n769: # Auto-fix formatting and safe lint issues\n770: cd openclaw-sandbox\n771: ruff check --fix .\n772: ruff format .\n773: '''\n774: \n775: ### Standard Skill Invocation\n776: \n777: '''bash\n778: # All skills follow this pattern:\n779: cd openclaw-sandbox\n780: uv run skills/<skill-name>/scripts/run_all.py --process-all\n781: \n782: # Common flags:\n783: #   --force          Re-process even completed files\n784: #   --resume         Continue from last checkpoint\n785: #   --subject <name> Process only one subject folder\n786: #   --from <N>       Start from phase N\n787: #   --log-json       Structured JSON logging (for log aggregation)\n788: '''\n789: \n790: ### Core Import Cheat Sheet\n791: \n792: '''python\n793: from core.utils.atomic_writer import AtomicWriter\n794: from core.utils.log_manager import build_logger\n795: from core.utils.path_builder import PathBuilder\n796: from core.orchestration.pipeline_base import PipelineBase\n797: from core.orchestration.task_queue import task_queue\n798: from core.state.state_manager import StateManager\n799: from core.state.resume_manager import ResumeManager\n800: from core.ai.llm_client import OllamaClient\nThe above content does NOT show the entire file contents. If you need to view any lines of the file which were not shown to complete your task, call this tool again to view those lines.\n"}

{"step_index":23,"source":"MODEL","type":"VIEW_FILE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T03:42:44Z","content":"Created At: 2026-05-29T03:42:44Z\nCompleted At: 2026-05-29T03:42:46Z\nFile Path: `file:///Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/memory/STARTUP.md`\nTotal Lines: 192\nTotal Bytes: 6812\nShowing lines 1 to 192\nThe following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.\n1: # AI Startup Protocol & Session Initialization\n2: \n3: > **Target Audience:** Development AIs (Google Antigravity, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot)\n4: > **Purpose:** Defines the canonical startup prompt and full execution process for every new conversation.\n5: > **Last Updated:** 2026-05-05\n6: \n7: ---\n8: \n9: ## Standard Startup Prompt (每次新對話複製貼上)\n10: \n11: > Copy and paste the following block at the beginning of every new conversation.\n12: \n13: '''\n14: 請先讀取 identity/AI_PROFILE.md，完成以下完整 Startup Sequence：\n15: \n16: 【Phase 1 — 記憶載入】\n17: 1. 讀取 identity/AI_PROFILE.md（角色定義、操作原則、禁止行為）\n18: 2. 讀取 memory/PROJECT_RULES.md（行為合約、硬體限制、完工流程、Code Review Checklist）\n19: 3. 讀取 memory/HANDOFF.md（上次對話在哪裡停止）\n20: 4. 讀取 memory/TASKS.md（目前待辦事項）\n21: 5. 讀取 docs/STRUCTURE.md（完整專案目錄地圖）\n22: 6. 讀取 memory/HISTORY.md（Session 索引，確認哪些已封存）\n23: 7. 讀取 memory/DECISIONS.md（架構決策紀錄，避免推翻已有決定）\n24: 8. 讀取 docs/CODING_GUIDELINES.md §15（AI-Native 文件系統規範）\n25: \n26: 【Phase 2 — 靜態分析（自動執行）】\n27: cd openclaw-sandbox && ./ops/check.sh\n28: （涵蓋 Ruff lint + Ruff format + Mypy，覆蓋 core/ + skills/ 共 133 個檔案）\n29: \n30: 【Phase 3 — 人工審查（逐項執行 PROJECT_RULES.md §6 Checklist）】\n31: 1. 無裸露 print()\n32: 2. 無硬編碼路徑\n33: 3. 所有 LLM 呼叫後有 unload_model()\n34: 4. 所有寫\n<truncated 4101 bytes>\nSSoT Verification)\n142: \n143: '''bash\n144: git -C openclaw-sandbox status\n145: git -C openclaw-sandbox log --oneline -5\n146: '''\n147: \n148: 逐一核對：\n149: - `docs/STRUCTURE.md` 是否反映實際目錄結構\n150: - `CHANGELOG.md` 是否記錄最近的變更\n151: - `skills/<skill>/SKILL.md` 是否已過時\n152: - `memory/HANDOFF.md` 的 `Last Updated` 是否為今日\n153: \n154: ---\n155: \n156: ### Phase 5 — Continuous Principle Sync\n157: \n158: - 掃描 `memory/sessions/` 中最新的 Session 檔案\n159: - 提取任何在對話中出現但尚未寫入 md 的原則\n160: - 路由到正確的 md 檔案（依照 `AI_PROFILE.md` 的路由表）\n161: - 每條原則必須以以下格式確認：\n162:   > `✅ 原則已記錄 → [target_file.md]：<rule content>`\n163: \n164: ---\n165: \n166: ### End-of-Session 完工流程\n167: \n168: '''\n169: 1. check.sh    → 確保 ✅ All checks passed\n170: 2. 更新所有相關 md 檔案\n171: 3. git add -A && git commit -m \"...\" && git push   ← 先推\n172: 4. python3 ops/archive_session.py                   ← 推完再封存\n173: 5. 更新 memory/HANDOFF.md & memory/TASKS.md\n174: '''\n175: \n176: > [!IMPORTANT]\n177: > `archive_session.py` 必須在 `git push` **之後**執行，否則對話尾端可能被截斷，無法完整封存。\n178: \n179: ---\n180: \n181: ## 原則路由表（快速參考）\n182: \n183: | 觸發情境 | 路由目標 |\n184: |:---|:---|\n185: | 操作習慣、Prompt Macro、溝通風格 | `identity/AI_PROFILE.md` |\n186: | 程式語法規範、命名規則、格式標準 | `docs/CODING_GUIDELINES.md` |\n187: | IDE 限制、執行協議、完工流程 | `memory/PROJECT_RULES.md` |\n188: | Sandbox Agent 倫理、邊界定義 | `openclaw-sandbox/SOUL.md` |\n189: | 為什麼選 X 不選 Y（架構決策） | `memory/DECISIONS.md` |\n190: | 目錄結構、資料路徑、核心模組變更 | `docs/STRUCTURE.md` |\n191: | CLI 介面、使用者操作說明 | `skills/<skill>/SKILL.md` |\n192: \nThe above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.\n"}

{"step_index":56,"source":"MODEL","type":"VIEW_FILE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T03:45:00Z","content":"Created At: 2026-05-29T03:45:00Z\nCompleted At: 2026-05-29T03:45:00Z\nFile Path: `file:///Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/openclaw-sandbox/core/utils/file_utils.py`\nTotal Lines: 128\nTotal Bytes: 3928\nShowing lines 1 to 128\nThe following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.\n1: \"\"\"\n2: core/file_utils.py — 共用檔案操作工具 (DRY Utilities)\n3: ======================================================\n4: Provides safe, exception-handled file operations to replace redundant\n5: try-except blocks across Open Claw skills.\n6: \n7: Functions:\n8:   safe_read_json   — Read and parse a JSON file safely.\n9:   ensure_dir       — Create directory if it doesn't exist.\n10:   managed_tmp_dir  — Context manager for temp dir with guaranteed cleanup.\n11:   encode_image_b64 — Encode an image file to a Base64 string (for VLM APIs).\n12:   write_csv_safe   — Write a list of rows to a CSV file using the stdlib csv module.\n13: \"\"\"\n14: \n15: from collections.abc import Generator\n16: from contextlib import contextmanager\n17: import json\n18: import logging\n19: import os\n20: import shutil\n21: import tempfile\n22: from typing import Any, Dict, Optional\n23: \n24: \n25: def safe_read_json(path: str, logger: Optional[logging.Logger] = None) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:\n26:     \"\"\"\n27:     Read and parse a JSON file safely.\n28:     Returns None if the file doesn't exist, is corrupted, or cannot be read.\n29:     \"\"\"\n30:     try:\n31:         with open(path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n32:             return json.load(f)\n33:     except FileNotFoundError:\n34:         return None\n35:     except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:\n36:         if logger:\n37:             logger.error(\"JSON 檔案損毀 (%s): %s\", path, exc)\n38:         return None\n39:     except OSError as exc:\n40:         if logger:\n41:             logger.error(\"無法讀取 JSON 檔案 (%s): %s\"\n<truncated 919 bytes>\nmage file to a Base64 string suitable for VLM API payloads.\n72: \n73:     Replaces the redundant `_encode_image()` helper scattered across skills\n74:     (e.g., p01d_vlm_vision.py). Centralised here per §3.4 Audit recommendation.\n75: \n76:     Args:\n77:         image_path: Absolute path to the image file.\n78: \n79:     Returns:\n80:         Base64-encoded string of the image bytes.\n81: \n82:     Raises:\n83:         FileNotFoundError: If the image path does not exist.\n84:         OSError: If the file cannot be read.\n85:     \"\"\"\n86:     import base64\n87: \n88:     with open(image_path, \"rb\") as f:\n89:         return base64.b64encode(f.read()).decode(\"utf-8\")\n90: \n91: \n92: def write_csv_safe(\n93:     path: str,\n94:     rows: list,\n95:     logger: object = None,\n96: ) -> bool:\n97:     \"\"\"\n98:     Write a list of rows to a CSV file using Python's stdlib csv module.\n99: \n100:     Replaces manual string-formatting CSV generation across skills (e.g.,\n101:     academic_edu_assistant p02_anki.py) to correctly handle commas and quotes.\n102: \n103:     Args:\n104:         path:   Absolute path to the output .csv file.\n105:         rows:   List of iterables, where each element is one CSV row.\n106:         logger: Optional logger for error reporting.\n107: \n108:     Returns:\n109:         True on success, False on failure.\n110:     \"\"\"\n111:     import csv as _csv\n112:     import io\n113: \n114:     from core.utils.atomic_writer import AtomicWriter\n115: \n116:     try:\n117:         output = io.StringIO()\n118:         writer = _csv.writer(output, quoting=_csv.QUOTE_MINIMAL)\n119:         writer.writerows(rows)\n120:         AtomicWriter.write_text(path, output.getvalue(), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n121:         return True\n122:     except Exception as exc:\n123:         if logger:\n124:             _log = getattr(logger, \"error\", None)\n125:             if callable(_log):\n126:                 _log(\"write_csv_safe failed (%s): %s\", path, exc)\n127:         return False\n128: \nThe above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.\n"}

---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n36: # Data Contracts\n37: # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n38: \n39: \n40: @dataclass\n41: class TaskManifest:\n42:     \"\"\"Describes a user-submitted ta\n<truncated 22733 bytes>\n     cwd = os.path.join(\n514:                 os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))),\n515:                 \"skills\",\n516:                 first_skill,\n517:             )\n518: \n519:             # Build command from cli_entry or fallback\n520:             if skill_manifest.cli_entry:\n521:                 script_path = os.path.join(cwd, skill_manifest.cli_entry)\n522:             else:\n523:                 script_path = os.path.join(cwd, \"scripts\", \"run_all.py\")\n524: \n525:             cmd = [sys.executable, script_path]\n526:             # Some skills expect --process-all (e.g. doc_parser)\n527:             if first_skill == \"doc_parser\":\n528:                 cmd.append(\"--process-all\")\n529: \n530:             task_queue.enqueue(\n531:                 name=f\"{first_skill} Pipeline\",\n532:                 cmd=cmd,\n533:                 cwd=cwd,\n534:                 filepath=target_path,\n535:                 skill=first_skill,\n536:                 chain=chain,\n537:                 subject=manifest.subject or \"Default\",\n538:                 env={\"OPENCLAW_ROUTER_MODEL\": manifest.model} if manifest.model else None,\n539:             )\n540: \n541:             workspace_root = os.path.dirname(\n542:                 os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))\n543:             )\n544:             update_session_manifest(\n545:                 workspace_root,\n546:                 manifest.subject or \"Default\",\n547:                 os.path.basename(target_path),\n548:                 first_skill,\n549:                 \"processing\",\n550:             )\n551: \n552:             results.append({\"skill\": first_skill, \"status\": \"enqueued\"})\n553:         except Exception as exc:\n554:             results.append({\"skill\": first_skill, \"status\": \"error\", \"error\": str(exc)})\n555:             print(f\"❌ [RouterAgent] {first_skill} 分發失敗: {exc}\")\n556: \n557:         return {\"plan\": chain, \"results\": results}\n558: \nThe above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.\n"}

{"step_index":91,"source":"MODEL","type":"VIEW_FILE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T03:46:19Z","content":"Created At: 2026-05-29T03:46:19Z\nCompleted At: 2026-05-29T03:46:19Z\nFile Path: `file:///Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/openclaw-sandbox/skills/audio_transcriber/SKILL.md`\nTotal Lines: 79\nTotal Bytes: 3026\nShowing lines 1 to 79\nThe following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.\n1: ---\n2: name: audio_transcriber\n3: description: End-to-end voice processing pipeline. Converts .m4a audio into polished, MLX-Whisper transcribed Obsidian-ready study notes.\n4: metadata:\n5:   {\n6:     \"openclaw\":\n7:       {\n8:         \"emoji\": \"🎙️\"\n9:       }\n10:   }\n11: state_tracking:\n12:   phases: [\"p1\", \"p2\", \"p3\"]\n13:   labels:\n14:     p1: \"P1 (轉錄)\"\n15:     p2: \"P2 (校對)\"\n16:     p3: \"P3 (合併)\"\n17: io_contracts:\n18:   consumes:\n19:     - \"audio/mp4\"\n20:     - \"audio/mpeg\"\n21:     - \"audio/wav\"\n22:   produces:\n23:     - \"text/markdown\"\n24: ---\n25: \n26: # Audio Transcriber Skill\n27: \n28: > **Pipeline**: M4A → Glossary → Transcription → Proofread → Merge\n29: \n30: ## Quick Start\n31: \n32: '''bash\n33: # 1. Drop audio files into the Universal Inbox\n34: cp lecture.m4a data/raw/<SubjectName>/\n35: \n36: # 2. Run in headless batch mode\n37: python3 skills/audio_transcriber/scripts/run_all.py --process-all\n38: \n39: # 3. Check pipeline progress\n40: cat data/audio_transcriber/state/checklist.md\n41: '''\n42: \n43: ## Anti-Hallucination Defense Architecture (V8.1)\n44: \n45: | Phase | Script | Function |\n46: |:---:|:---|:---|\n47: | P0 | `p00_glossary.py` | Glossary initialisation — prevents LLM from fabricating domain-specific terms |\n48: | P1 | `p01_transcribe.py` | High-fidelity transcription via MLX-Whisper. **VAD silence-trimming guard**: uses `pydub.silence` to pre-strip noise (Requires `ffmpeg` installed on system to decode audio files). If `silence_ratio > max_removal_ratio` (default: 0.90) or ffmpeg decoding fails, automatically falls back to the raw audio to prevent over-trimming. Includes multi-clip majority-vote language detection. |\n49: | P2 | `p02_glossary_apply.py` | Automatically applies glossary constraints to the raw transcript to ensure terminology accuracy before proofreading. |\n50: | P3 | `p03_merge.py` | Cross-segment consolidation and refinement. |\n51: | Handoff | (Autonomous) | The RouterAgent automatically forwards the merged transcript to the `proofreader` skill for AI verification against reference material and dashboard review. |\n52: \n53: ## Common Commands\n54: \n55: '''bash\n56: # Run full pipeline on all pending files\n57: python3 skills/audio_transcriber/scripts/run_all.py --process-all\n58: \n59: # Run from a specific phase\n60: python3 skills/audio_transcriber/scripts/run_all.py --from 2\n61: \n62: # Force re-run on all files\n63: python3 skills/audio_transcriber/scripts/run_all.py --process-all --force\n64: \n65: # Regenerate glossary only\n66: python3 skills/audio_transcriber/scripts/run_all.py --glossary\n67: \n68: # Process a single subject\n69: python3 skills/audio_transcriber/scripts/run_all.py --subject <SubjectName>\n70: '''\n71: \n72: ## Global Standards\n73: \n74: - **Zero Temperature**: `config.yaml` enforces `temperature: 0` to guarantee deterministic, hallucination-free outputs.\n75: - **Headless CLI**: Supports `--process-all`, `--from`, `--force`, `--resume`, `--log-json` for full CI/CD compatibility.\n76: - **Preflight Check**: Validates all dependencies and config on every run before processing begins.\n77: - **Checkpoint Resume**: All phase completions are saved to `state/`; use `--resume` to continue after an interruption.\n78: - macOS native notifications (`osascript`) and graceful `KeyboardInterrupt` handling with checkpoint save.\n79: \nThe above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.\n"}

{"step_index":103,"source":"MODEL","type":"VIEW_FILE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T03:47:23Z","content":"Created At: 2026-05-29T03:47:23Z\nCompleted At: 2026-05-29T03:47:24Z\nFile Path: `file:///Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/openclaw-sandbox/skills/doc_parser/scripts/phases/p01a_engine.py`\nTotal Lines: 651\nTotal Bytes: 27391\nShowing lines 1 to 651\nThe following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.\n1: \"\"\"\n2: pdf_engine.py — Phase 1a: Docling 深度提取\n3: ==========================================\n4: 在 Phase 1a 診斷通過後，使用 Docling（IBM）執行完整的 PDF 結構提取：\n5: - 文字（含 Layout Analysis，處理多欄）\n6: - 表格（pdfplumber）\n7: - raster 圖片（PyMuPDF / fitz）\n8: - 參考文獻（reference_injector.py，後續 phase）\n9: \n10: Phase 1a 設計決策：\n11: - Docling 完成後立即 gc.collect()（釋放 ~2.5GB 記憶體）\n12: - 字型損壞 fallback：Docling + pdftoppm OCR 交叉驗證，差異 > 20% 以 OCR 為主\n13: - raw_extracted.md 永遠 IMMUTABLE（任何 AI 不得修改）\n14: \n15: 依賴：\n16:   pip install docling pymupdf pdfplumber\n17: \"\"\"\n18: \n19: import gc\n20: import hashlib\n21: import json\n22: import os\n23: import shutil\n24: import sys\n25: from typing import Dict, Optional\n26: \n27: from core.orchestration.pipeline_base import PipelineBase\n28: from core.state.resume_manager import ResumeManager\n29: from core.utils.atomic_writer import AtomicWriter\n30: \n31: \n32: class Phase1aPDFEngine(PipelineBase):\n33:     \"\"\"\n34:     Phase 1a: Docling Deep Extraction.\n35:     Reads scan_report.json from Phase 0a to adapt processing strategy.\n36:     \"\"\"\n37: \n38:     # Font fallback threshold is defined in config.yaml.\n39:     FONT_FALLBACK_DIFF_THRESHOLD = None\n40: \n41:     def __init__(self) -> None:\n42:         super().__init__(\n43:             phase_key=\"p1a\",\n44:             phase_name=\"Docling 深度提取\",\n45:             skill_name=\"doc_parser\",\n46:         )\n47: \n<truncated 27021 bytes>\n_id}_error.json\")\n602:         from core import AtomicWriter\n603: \n604:         AtomicWriter.write_json(error_meta, {\"pdf_id\": pdf_id, \"reason\": reason})\n605: \n606:         self.error(f\"❌ [Phase 1a] {pdf_id} 已移至 Error/ — {reason}\")\n607: \n608:     @staticmethod\n609:     def _try_empty_password(pdf_path: str) -> bool:\n610:         \"\"\"Check if encrypted PDF can be opened with empty password.\"\"\"\n611:         try:\n612:             import fitz\n613: \n614:             doc = fitz.open(pdf_path)\n615:             if doc.is_encrypted:\n616:                 return doc.authenticate(\"\")\n617:             return True\n618:         except Exception:\n619:             return False\n620: \n621:     @staticmethod\n622:     def _sha256(path: str) -> str:\n623:         sha = hashlib.sha256()\n624:         with open(path, \"rb\") as f:\n625:             for block in iter(lambda: f.read(4096), b\"\"):\n626:                 sha.update(block)\n627:         return sha.hexdigest()\n628: \n629: \n630: # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n631: #  CLI Entry Point                                                              #\n632: # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n633: \n634: if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n635:     import argparse\n636: \n637:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\"Phase 1a: Docling PDF Extraction\")\n638:     parser.add_argument(\"pdf\", help=\"Path to PDF file\")\n639:     parser.add_argument(\"--id\", dest=\"pdf_id\", default=None)\n640:     args = parser.parse_args()\n641: \n642:     pdf_id = args.pdf_id or os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(args.pdf))[0]\n643:     engine = Phase1aPDFEngine()\n644:     result = engine.run(subject=\"default_subject\", file_filter=os.path.basename(args.pdf))\n645: \n646:     if result:\n647:         print(f\"\\n✅ 提取完成: {result}\")\n648:     else:\n649:         print(\"\\n❌ 提取失敗（查看 Error/ 目錄）\")\n650:         sys.exit(1)\n651: \nThe above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.\n"}

Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.\n1: import json\n2: import os\n3: from typing import Optional\n4: \n5: # Internal Core Bootstrap\n6: from core import AtomicWriter, PipelineBase\n7: from core.utils.file_utils import encode_image_b64  # S3: DRY — replaces private _encode_image()\n8: \n9: \n10: class Phase1dVLMVision(PipelineBase):\n11:     def __init__(self) -> None:\n12:         super().__init__(phase_key=\"p1d\", phase_name=\"VLM 視覺圖表解析\", skill_name=\"doc_parser\")\n13:         config = self.get_config(\"phase1d\")\n14:         self.vlm_model = config.get(\"model\")\n15:         self.vlm_options = config.get(\"options\", {})\n16:         self.vlm_concurrency = int(config.get(\"vlm_concurrency\", 1))\n17:         if not self.vlm_model:\n18:             raise RuntimeError(\"Missing model in phase1d config profile\")\n19: \n20:     def _read_vlm_prompt_route(self, subject: str, pdf_id: str) -> str:\n21:         \"\"\"F1: Read vlm_prompt_route from scan_report.json to select an adaptive prompt.\n22: \n23:         Returns:\n24:             str: prompt route key, e.g. \"academic\", \"report\", \"manual\", \"default\".\n25:         \"\"\"\n26:         report_path = os.path.join(\n27:             self.dirs.get(\"processed\", \"\"), subject, pdf_id, \"scan_report.json\"\n28:         )\n29:         try:\n30:             with open(report_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n31:                 data = json.load(f)\n32:             return data.get(\"vlm_prompt_route\", \"default\")\n33:         except Exception:\n34:             return \"default\"\n35: \n36:     def _get_adaptive_vlm_prompt(self, subject: str, pdf_id: str) -> str:\n37:\n<truncated 7882 bytes>\n                        self.vlm_concurrency\n195:                     )  # Configurable concurrent VLM requests\n196: \n197:                     async def _bounded_process(*args):\n198:                         async with semaphore:\n199:                             return await _process_img(*args)\n200: \n201:                     tasks = [\n202:                         _bounded_process(i, rel, cols, b64) for i, rel, cols, b64 in pending_tasks\n203:                     ]\n204:                     return await asyncio.gather(*tasks)\n205: \n206:                 results = asyncio.run(_run_all())\n207: \n208:                 for idx, new_cols in results:\n209:                     lines[idx] = \"| \" + \" | \".join(new_cols) + \" |\\n\"\n210:                     modifications += 1\n211: \n212:             if modifications > 0:\n213:                 AtomicWriter.write_text(figure_list_path, \"\".join(lines))\n214:                 self.info(f\"💾 [Phase 1d] 成功更新了 {modifications} 張圖片的描述至 figure_list.md\")\n215:             else:\n216:                 self.info(\"🆗 [Phase 1d] 沒有需要解析的新圖片。\")\n217: \n218:             self.state_manager.update_task(subject, filename, self.phase_key, \"✅\")\n219: \n220:             self.emit_completed(pdf_path, subject, chain=[])\n221:             return True\n222:         except Exception as e:\n223:             self.error(f\"❌ [Phase 1d] 處理失敗: {e}\")\n224:             self.state_manager.update_task(subject, filename, self.phase_key, \"❌\", note_tag=str(e))\n225:             return False\n226: \n227: \n228: if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n229:     import argparse\n230: \n231:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()\n232:     parser.add_argument(\"pdf\", help=\"The PDF path\")\n233:     args = parser.parse_args()\n234: \n235:     filename = os.path.basename(args.pdf)\n236:     phase = Phase1dVLMVision()\n237:     success = phase.run(subject=\"Default\", file_filter=filename)\n238:     print(f\"Success: {success}\")\n239: \nThe above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.\n"}

{"step_index":109,"source":"MODEL","type":"VIEW_FILE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T03:47:35Z","content":"Created At: 2026-05-29T03:47:35Z\nCompleted At: 2026-05-29T03:47:35Z\nFile Path: `file:///Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/openclaw-sandbox/core/ai/knowledge_pusher.py`\nTotal Lines: 89\nTotal Bytes: 2928\nShowing lines 1 to 89\nThe following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.\n1: \"\"\"\n2: core/knowledge_pusher.py — Open WebUI Knowledge Integration\n3: ============================================================\n4: This script bridges Open Claw and Open WebUI. It takes a generated\n5: Markdown note (from note_generator) and pushes it to Open WebUI's\n6: Knowledge Base API (or ChromaDB vector store) for retrieval-augmented\n7: generation (RAG).\n8: \"\"\"\n9: \n10: import json\n11: import os\n12: import sys\n13: import urllib.error\n14: import urllib.request\n15: \n16: from rich import print\n17: \n18: from core.utils.workspace import get_workspace_root\n19: \n20: _workspace_root = get_workspace_root()\n21: \n22: \n23: class KnowledgePusher:\n24:     def __init__(self):\n25:         # Read API URL and Key from environment or defaults\n26:         self.api_url = os.environ.get(\"WEBUI_API_URL\", \"http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/v1\")\n27:         self.api_key = os.environ.get(\"WEBUI_API_KEY\", \"\")\n28: \n29:     def push_to_knowledge_base(\n30:         self, filepath: str, title: str = \"\", collection_name: str = \"open-claw-notes\"\n31:     ) -> bool:\n32:         \"\"\"\n33:         Pushes a Markdown file to the Open WebUI Knowledge API.\n34:         \"\"\"\n35:         if not os.path.exists(filepath):\n36:             print(f\"❌ [Pusher] 檔案不存在: {filepath}\")\n37:             return False\n38: \n39:         if not self.api_key:\n40:             print(\"⚠️ [Pusher] 未設定 WEBUI_API_KEY，跳過知識庫推送。\")\n41:             return False\n42: \n43:         try:\n44:             with open(filepath, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n45:                 content = f.read()\n46: \n47:             if not title:\n48:                 title = os.path.basename(filepath).replace(\".md\", \"\")\n49: \n50:             payload = json.dumps(\n51:                 {\"collection_name\": collection_name, \"title\": title, \"content\": content}\n52:             ).encode(\"utf-8\")\n53: \n54:             req = urllib.request.Request(\n55:                 f\"{self.api_url}/knowledge/documents\",\n56:                 data=payload,\n57:                 headers={\n58:                     \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n59:                     \"Authorization\": f\"Bearer {self.api_key}\",\n60:                 },\n61:                 method=\"POST\",\n62:             )\n63: \n64:             with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10) as resp:\n65:                 if resp.status in (200, 201):\n66:                     print(\n67:                         f\"✅ [Pusher] 成功將 {title} 推送至 Open WebUI 知識庫 ({collection_name})\"\n68:                     )\n69:                     return True\n70:                 else:\n71:                     print(f\"⚠️ [Pusher] 推送失敗，狀態碼: {resp.status}\")\n72:                     return False\n73: \n74:         except Exception as e:\n75:             print(f\"❌ [Pusher] 推送過程中發生錯誤: {e}\")\n76:             return False\n77: \n78: \n79: if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n80:     if len(sys.argv) < 2:\n81:         print(\"Usage: python3 knowledge_pusher.py <markdown_file_path> [collection_name]\")\n82:         sys.exit(1)\n83: \n84:     filepath = sys.argv[1]\n85:     collection = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 else \"open-claw-notes\"\n86: \n87:     pusher = KnowledgePusher()\n88:     pusher.push_to_knowledge_base(filepath, collection_name=collection)\n89: \nThe above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.\n"}

\"success\", \"failed\", \"paused\"\n42:     data: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\n43:     errors: List[str] = field(d\n<truncated 31853 bytes>\nter phases start fresh\n723: \n724:             try:\n725:                 phase_obj.run(  # type: ignore[attr-defined]\n726:                     force=getattr(args, \"force\", False),\n727:                     subject=getattr(args, \"subject\", None),\n728:                     file_filter=getattr(args, \"file\", None),\n729:                     single_mode=getattr(args, \"single\", False),\n730:                     resume_from=phase_resume,\n731:                 )\n732:             except Exception as exc:\n733:                 phase_obj._write_session_state(SessionState.FAILED, context={\"error\": str(exc)})\n734:                 phase_obj.log(f\"💥 Phase {idx} 失敗: {exc}\", \"error\")\n735:                 any_stopped = True\n736:                 break\n737: \n738:             if phase_obj.stop_requested:\n739:                 if phase_obj.pause_requested:\n740:                     phase_obj._write_session_state(SessionState.PAUSED)\n741:                     phase_obj.log(\"💾 Pipeline 已暫停並儲存進度。\")\n742:                 else:\n743:                     phase_obj._write_session_state(SessionState.STOPPED)\n744:                     phase_obj.log(\"🛑 Pipeline 已停止。\")\n745:                 any_stopped = True\n746:                 break\n747: \n748:             phase_obj._write_session_state(SessionState.COMPLETED)\n749: \n750:             # Don't ask for permission.\n[diff_block_start]\n@@ -120,6 +120,15 @@\n     #  Logging                                                             #\n     # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n \n+    @contextlib.contextmanager\n+    def llm_session(self, model: str):\n+        \"\"\"Context manager to ensure the LLM model is gracefully unloaded after use (ADR-018).\"\"\"\n+        try:\n+            yield\n+        finally:\n+            if getattr(self, \"llm\", None) and hasattr(self.llm, \"unload_model\"):\n+                self.llm.unload_model(model, logger=self)\n+\n     def _setup_logging(self) -> None:\n         self.logger = self.logger or build_logger(\n             f\"OpenClaw.{self.skill_name}\",\n[diff_block_end]\n\nPlease note that the above snippet only shows the MODIFIED lines from the last change. {"step_index":161,"source":"MODEL","type":"PLANNER_RESPONSE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T03:51:44Z","thinking":"**Prioritizing Tool Usage**\n\nI'm now focusing on tool selection, emphasizing specific tools over general ones where possible. This strategy promises a more targeted and less error-prone approach to problem-solving, which I will continue to refine and implement moving forward.\n\n\n**Refining Tool Application**\n\nI'm now integrating new rules, as I am reminded: Never use `cat` to create or append, always prioritize `grep_search`, and avoid using `ls`, `cat`, `grep`, and `sed` for their generic purposes. Moreover, I'm ensuring I list all related tools before execution, only proceeding if the selected set T is the most specific option. Based on a `grep_search` result, I see a need to address `_used_models` in the code.\n\n\n**Analyzing Model Lifecycle**\n\nI've realized the current model unloading approach, while functional, causes inefficient loading and unloading due to repeated calls within the proofreading script, especially given it's dynamic model usage. The goal of the existing approach was to keep the model loaded, and I need to maintain this, meaning I shouldn't just wrap the `_unload_used_models` call in `llm_session`. Instead, I think the correct approach is to wrap the actual LLM calls themselves within the session.\n\n\n**Implementing Session Wrappers**\n\nI'm now focusing on wrapping the entire `process_tasks` call, aligning perfectly with ADR-018's guidelines on `llm_session`. I realized per-chunk usage would be disastrous and that an end-of-script unloading approach like the one in `p01d_vlm_vision.py` is compliant, but not optimal. I'm clarifying the implementation plan: `llm_session(model_name)` will wrap `process_tasks`. The user's directive, emphasizing either `unload_model()` or `llm_session()`, has solidified this.\n\n\n","tool_calls":[{"name":"grep_search","args":{"CaseInsensitive":"false","Includes":"[]","IsRegex":"false","MatchPerLine":"true","Query":"\"unload_model\"","SearchPath":"\"/Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/openclaw-sandbox/skills/proofreader/scripts/phases/p01_doc_proofread.py\"","toolAction":"\"Searching for unload_model in p01_doc_proofread.py\"","toolSummary":"\"Search for unload_model\""}}]}

from core.state.global_registry import GlobalRegistry\n6: \n7: \n8: class BaseProofreadPhase(PipelineBase):\n9:     \"\"\"\n10:     Shared base class for proofreader phases to eliminate boilerplate and unify reference data lookup.\n11:     \"\"\"\n12: \n13:     def _unload_used_models(self) -> None:\n14:         if hasattr(self, \"_used_models\"):\n15:             for m in self._used_models:\n16:                 self.llm.unload_model(m, logger=self)\n17: \n18:     def _get_reference_data(\n19:         self,\n20:         subject: str,\n21:         prefix: str,\n22:         transcript_text: str = None,\n23:         use_semantic_fallback: bool = False,\n24:     ) -> Tuple[str, str]:\n25:         \"\"\"Fetch doc_parser reference text and figure list for this prefix.\n26: \n27:         Reads all paths registered under (subject, prefix, \"doc_parser\") in GlobalRegistry.\n28:         Optionally uses Semantic Matcher to find related docs if no direct match is found.\n29:         \"\"\"\n30:         registry = GlobalRegistry(self.workspace_root)\n31:         paths = registry.get_asset_paths(subject, prefix, \"doc_parser\")\n32: \n33:         # Fast Path Fallback: Semantic Matching\n34:         if not paths and use_semantic_fallback and transcript_text:\n35:             self.log(f\"⚠️ 找不到前綴 {prefix} 的直接配對，啟動語意檢索 (Semantic Pairing)...\")\n36: \n37:             try:\n38:                 from core.ai.semantic_matcher import SemanticMatcher\n39: \n40:                 matcher \n<truncated 653 bytes>\ncoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n53:                                 candidate_docs[doc_prefix] = f.read()[:500]\n54:                         except Exception:\n55:                             pass\n56: \n57:                 if candidate_docs:\n58:                     best_prefixes = matcher.find_best_matches(\n59:                         transcript_text, candidate_docs, logger=self\n60:                     )\n61:                     for bp in best_prefixes:\n62:                         paths.extend(registry.get_asset_paths(subject, bp, \"doc_parser\"))\n63:                     if not best_prefixes:\n64:                         self.log(\"⚠️ 語意檢索未能找到相關講義，放棄配對。\")\n65:                 else:\n66:                     self.log(\"⚠️ 該 subject 無任何 doc_parser 候選講義，放棄配對。\")\n67:             except ImportError:\n68:                 self.log(\"⚠️ 無法載入 SemanticMatcher\", \"warn\")\n69: \n70:         ref_parts: list[str] = []\n71:         fig_parts: list[str] = []\n72:         ref_files = []\n73: \n74:         for p in paths:\n75:             if not os.path.exists(p):\n76:                 continue\n77: \n78:             ref_files.append(os.path.basename(p))\n79: \n80:             try:\n81:                 with open(p, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n82:                     ref_parts.append(f.read()[:6000])\n83:             except Exception:\n84:                 pass\n85: \n86:             fig_path = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(p), \"figure_list.md\")\n87:             if os.path.exists(fig_path):\n88:                 try:\n89:                     with open(fig_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n90:                         fig_parts.append(f.read())\n91:                 except Exception:\n92:                     pass\n93: \n94:         self._current_ref_files = ref_files\n95:         ref_text = (\"\\n\\n---\\n\\n\".join(ref_parts))[:20000]\n96:         figure_list_text = \"\\n\\n\".join(fig_parts)\n97:         return ref_text, figure_list_text\n98: \nThe above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.\n"}

Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.\n1: # TASKS.md — Task Tracker\n2: \n3: > **Last Updated:** 2026-05-29 (V9.22 — Orchestration Hardening & Telegram GUI Integration)\n4: \n5: ---\n6: \n7: ## 🔴 High Priority (阻斷性問題 / 核心功能)\n8: \n9: *(None currently)*\n10: \n11: ---\n12: \n13: ## 1. 優先處理 (High Priority)\n14: - [ ] **Phase 1 (StateManager Decoupling)**: Shift `state_tracking: phases` and `labels` to the `SKILL.md` YAML Frontmatter for all skills, and refactor `StateManager.__init__` to load them dynamically via `SkillRegistry`.\n15: - [ ] **Phase 2 (RouterAgent Decoupling)**: Shift `io_contracts: consumes/produces` to `SKILL.md`, and refactor `RouterAgent._on_pipeline_completed` to use standard `resolve_paths()` handoffs instead of hardcoded skill names. Move LLM decomposition descriptions out of code.\n16: - [ ] **Verify Complete End-to-End Incubator Flow**: Drop a raw `.md` file with a `Gemini_` prefix into `data/raw/inbox/`. Verify that `inbox_daemon` routes it to `student_researcher` (Phase 0 -> Phase 1 -> Phase 2), assigns it to `Incubator` or an existing subject, moves it to `knowledge_compiler` via `RouterAgent`, and outputs it into the `wiki/Incubator/` folder in Obsidian.\n17: - [ ] **E2E Stability Test**: Run `.m4a` + `.pdf` + `.pptx` through the full pipeline (`audio_transcriber` → `doc_parser` → `proofreader` → `note_generator`) to ensure pipeline state remains clean and files do not get stuck in intermediate stages.\n18: - Added Dynamic Silence Removal Ratio Logging (`note_tag`) to state manager checklist.\n85:   - Implemented universal `--clear` / `-c` CLI argument across all 12 skills.\n86:   - Added `clear_progress()` method to `StateManager`.\n87:   - Unified `--clear` handling in `PipelineBase.run_skill_pipeline()`.\n88: \n89: - [x] 2026-05-23: **V9.18 OpenClaw Native Pipeline Skills Integration (ADR-013)**\n90:   - Diagnosed `symlink-escape` block preventing OpenClaw from recognizing sandbox pipeline skills.\n91:   - {"step_index":188,"source":"MODEL","type":"VIEW_FILE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T03:52:56Z","content":"Created At: 2026-05-29T03:52:56Z\nCompleted At: 2026-05-29T03:52:56Z\nFile Path: `file:///Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/openclaw-sandbox/core/orchestration/skill_registry.py`\nTotal Lines: 204\nTotal Bytes: 8082\nShowing lines 1 to 204\nThe following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.\n1: \"\"\"\n2: core/skill_registry.py — Dynamic Plugin Discovery Architecture (#17)\n3: ====================================================================\n4: Enables zero-friction extensibility: new Skills are auto-discovered\n5: by scanning the skills/ directory at startup for a manifest.py file\n6: that conforms to the SkillManifest protocol.\n7: \n8: CURRENT STATUS: Fully functional discovery + registration.\n9:   Async execution wiring (#16) and CLI/Telegram auto-population\n10:   are the remaining P3 integration tasks.\n11: \n12: Usage:\n13:     from core.orchestration.skill_registry import SkillRegistry\n14: \n15:     registry = SkillRegistry(skills_root=\"/path/to/skills\")\n16:     registry.discover()\n17: \n18:     for name, manifest in registry.all().items():\n19:         print(f\"{name}: {manifest.description}\")\n20: \n21:     run_fn = registry.get_run_fn(\"audio_transcriber\")\n22:     run_fn(subject=\"math\", force=False)\n23: \"\"\"\n24: \n25: from __future__ import annotations\n26: \n27: from dataclasses import dataclass, field\n28: import importlib.util\n29: import os\n30: import sys\n31: from typing import Callable, Dict, List, Optional\n32: \n33: from rich import print\n34: \n35: # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n36: # SkillManifest Protocol (#17)\n37: # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n38: \n39: \n40: @dataclass\n41: class SkillManifest:\n42:     \"\"\"Interface contract every discoverable Skill must implement.\n43: \n44:     Place a manifest.py in skills/<skill-name>/ that exposes a mo\n<truncated 5465 bytes>\nore[union-attr]\n162:         finally:\n163:             sys.path.remove(skill_dir)\n164: \n165:         manifest = getattr(mod, \"MANIFEST\", None)\n166:         if not isinstance(manifest, SkillManifest):\n167:             raise TypeError(\n168:                 f\"manifest.py must expose MANIFEST: SkillManifest, got {type(manifest)}\"\n169:             )\n170:         return manifest\n171: \n172:     def register(self, manifest: SkillManifest) -> None:\n173:         \"\"\"Manually register a SkillManifest (for testing or programmatic use).\"\"\"\n174:         self._registry[manifest.skill_name] = manifest\n175: \n176:     def get(self, skill_name: str) -> Optional[SkillManifest]:\n177:         \"\"\"Return a SkillManifest by name, or None if not found.\"\"\"\n178:         return self._registry.get(skill_name)\n179: \n180:     def get_run_fn(self, skill_name: str) -> Callable:\n181:         \"\"\"Return the run callable for a skill, raising KeyError if missing.\"\"\"\n182:         manifest = self._registry.get(skill_name)\n183:         if manifest is None:\n184:             raise KeyError(\n185:                 f\"Skill '{skill_name}' not registered. Run SkillRegistry.discover() first.\"\n186:             )\n187:         if manifest.run_fn is None:\n188:             raise NotImplementedError(\n189:                 f\"Skill '{skill_name}' has no run_fn defined in its manifest.\"\n190:             )\n191:         return manifest.run_fn\n192: \n193:     def all(self) -> Dict[str, SkillManifest]:\n194:         \"\"\"Return a copy of the full registry.\"\"\"\n195:         return dict(self._registry)\n196: \n197:     def list_names(self) -> List[str]:\n198:         \"\"\"Return sorted list of all registered skill names.\"\"\"\n199:         return sorted(self._registry.keys())\n200: \n201:     def for_file_type(self, ext: str) -> List[SkillManifest]:\n202:         \"\"\"Return skills that can handle a given file extension.\"\"\"\n203:         return [m for m in self._registry.values() if ext.lower() in m.file_types]\n204: \nThe above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.\n"}

Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.\n1: \"\"\"\n2: core/router_agent.py — Cross-Skill Dynamic Orchestration (#13)\n3: ==============================================================\n4: Strategic scaffold for the Router Agent, which chains multiple Skills\n5: into automated end-to-end workflows based on file type and user intent.\n6: \n7: CURRENT STATUS: Scaffold / Interface Definition\n8:   This file defines the data contracts and orchestration skeleton.\n9:   Actual skill invocation wiring is deferred to P3 implementation.\n10: \n11: Usage (future):\n12:     from core.orchestration.router_agent import RouterAgent, TaskManifest\n13: \n14:     manifest = TaskManifest(\n15:         source_path=\"/path/to/lecture.m4a\",\n16:         intent=\"transcribe_and_compile\",\n17:     )\n18:     RouterAgent().dispatch(manifest)\n19: \"\"\"\n20: \n21: from __future__ import annotations\n22: \n23: from dataclasses import dataclass, field\n24: import json\n25: import os\n26: import sys\n27: from typing import Any, Callable, Dict, List, Optional\n28: import logging\n29: \n30: logger = logging.getLogger(\"OpenClaw.RouterAgent\")\n31: \n32: from core.cli.cli_runner import SkillRunner\n33: from core.orchestration.event_bus import DomainEvent, EventBus\n34: from core.orchestration.session_manifest import update_session_manifest\n35: from core.orchestration.task_queue import task_queue\n36: from core.state.global_registry import GlobalRegistry\n37: \n38: # index 0 is proofreader itself\n353:                             eager_target_dir = os.path.join(\n354:                                 workspace_root, \"data\", eager_next, \"input\", subject\n355:                             )\n356:                             os.makedirs(eager_target_dir, exist_ok=True)\n357:                             import shutil\n358: \n359:                             eager_target_path = os.path.join(\n360:                                 eager_target_dir, os.path.basename(filepath)\n361:                             )\n362:                             if os.path.exists(filepath) and filepath != eager_target_path:\n363:                                 shutil.copy2(filepath, eager_target_path)\n364: \n365:                             eager_script = \"scripts/run_all.py\"\n366:                             if self._registry:\n367:                                 mf = self._registry.get(eager_next)\n368:                                 if mf and mf.cli_entry:\n369:                                     eager_script = mf.cli_entry\n370: \n371:                             eager_cmd = [sys.executable, eager_script, \"--subject\", subject]\n372:                             eager_cwd = os.path.join(workspace_root, \"skills\", eager_next)\n373: \n374:                             logger.info(\n375:                                 f\"⏩ [RouterAgent] Eager Execution: 已提前啟動 {eager_next} (草稿模式，基於 pre-HITL 校對輸出)\"\n376:                             )\n377: \n378:                             task_queue.enqueue(\n379:                                 name=f\"EAGER: {eager_next} ({subject})\",\n380:                                 cmd=eager_cmd,\nThe above content does NOT show the entire file contents. {"step_index":205,"source":"MODEL","type":"PLANNER_RESPONSE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T03:53:40Z","content":"`from rich import print` 讓所有 `print()` 呼叫都走 rich 路徑。這些檔案大多是 CLI/服務層，但 `state_manager.py` 和 `skill_registry.py` 是核心模組，需要改為 logging。讓我批次處理：","tool_calls":[{"name":"run_command","args":{"CommandLine":"\"for f in \\\\\\n  /Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/openclaw-sandbox/core/orchestration/skill_registry.py \\\\\\n  /Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/openclaw-sandbox/core/state/state_manager.py \\\\\\n  /Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/openclaw-sandbox/core/state/resume_manager.py \\\\\\n  /Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/openclaw-sandbox/core/utils/subject_manager.py \\\\\\n  /Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/openclaw-sandbox/core/orchestration/human_gate.py; do\\n  # Check if logging is already imported\\n  if grep -q \\\"^import logging\\\" \\\"$f\\\"; then\\n    # Just remove the rich import line\\n    sed -i '' '/^from rich import print$/d' \\\"$f\\\"\\n  else\\n    # Replace the rich import with logging import + logger\\n    BASENAME=$(basename \\\"$f\\\" .py)\\n    LOGGER_NAME=\\\"OpenClaw.$(echo $BASENAME | sed 's/_/\\\\u/g')\\\"\\n    sed -i '' \\\"s|^from rich import print$|import logging\\\\nlogger = logging.getLogger(\\\\\\\"OpenClaw.${BASENAME}\\\\\\\")|\\\" \\\"$f\\\"\\n  fi\\n  echo \\\"Done: $f\\\"\\ndone\"","Cwd":"\"/Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace\"","WaitMsBeforeAsync":"3000","toolAction":"\"Removing rich print imports from core modules\"","toolSummary":"\"Replace rich print with logging\""}}]}

{"step_index":219,"source":"MODEL","type":"PLANNER_RESPONSE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T03:54:55Z","content":"`print_dashboard()` 是 **UI 輸出**，需要保留 `print`（這是 CLI 可視介面，符合 §8.1 中 CLI entry-point 豁免原則）。`resume_manager.py` 的 `print` 和 `human_gate.py` 的 `print` 也是 CLI 互動輸出，同屬豁免範圍。`subject_manager.py` 的 `print` 需確認。","tool_calls":[{"name":"run_command","args":{"CommandLine":"\"sed -n '25,40p' /Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/openclaw-sandbox/core/utils/subject_manager.py\"","Cwd":"\"/Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace\"","WaitMsBeforeAsync":"2000","toolAction":"\"Viewing subject_manager.py\"","toolSummary":"\"Read subject_manager.py context\""}}]}
{"step_index":220,"source":"MODEL","type":"RUN_COMMAND","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T03:55:01Z","content":"Created At: 2026-05-29T03:55:01Z\nCompleted At: 2026-05-29T03:55:03Z\n\n\t\t\t\tThe command completed successfully.\n\t\t\t\tOutput:\n\t\t\t\t\n    Returns:\n        True  → user confirmed overwrite.\n        False → user declined; caller should skip.\n    \"\"\"\n    display = f\"[{subject}] {item_id} ({phase_label})\"\n    print(f\"\\n❓ {display} 已完成。\")\n    choice = input(\"   是否重新處理並覆寫？(y/N): \").strip().lower()\n    return choice == \"y\"\n\n\ndef should_process_task(\n    task: dict,\n    current_phase_key: str,\n    previous_phase_key: str | None = None,\n    force: bool = False,\n\n"}
{"step_index":221,"source":"MODEL","type":"PLANNER_RESPONSE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T03:55:03Z","content":"`subject_manager.py` 的 `print` 是互動 CLI 輸出（`input()` 前的提示），屬於 CLI 豁免範疇，保留。現在進入 **Phase 2 Decoupling**：更新 `SKILL.md` 的 YAML frontmatter 來補齊缺少 `state_tracking` 和 `io_contracts` 的技能，以及修正 `RouterAgent` 的 `proofreader` 硬編碼邏輯。\n\n先檢查哪些 `SKILL.md` 缺少 frontmatter：","tool_calls":[{"name":"run_command","args":{"CommandLine":"\"for skill_dir in /Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/openclaw-sandbox/skills/*/; do\\n  skill=$(basename \\\"$skill_dir\\\")\\n  md=\\\"$skill_dir/SKILL.md\\\"\\n  if [ -f \\\"$md\\\" ]; then\\n    if ! grep -q \\\"state_tracking:\\\" \\\"$md\\\"; then\\n      echo \\\"MISSING state_tracking: $skill\\\"\\n    fi\\n    if ! grep -q \\\"io_contracts:\\\" \\\"$md\\\"; then\\n      echo \\\"MISSING io_contracts:   $skill\\\"\\n    fi\\n  else\\n    echo \\\"NO SKILL.md: $skill\\\"\\n  fi\\ndone\"","Cwd":"\"/Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace\"","WaitMsBeforeAsync":"3000","toolAction":"\"Auditing SKILL.md frontmatters\"","toolSummary":"\"Check SKILL.md frontmatters\""}}]}

{"step_index":223,"source":"MODEL","type":"PLANNER_RESPONSE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T03:55:13Z","tool_calls":[{"name":"run_command","args":{"CommandLine":"\"# Check which skills have io_contracts entries vs which have them empty\\nfor skill_dir in /Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/openclaw-sandbox/skills/*/; do\\n  skill=$(basename \\\"$skill_dir\\\")\\n  md=\\\"$skill_dir/SKILL.md\\\"\\n  [ \\\"$skill\\\" = \\\"__pycache__\\\" ] && continue\\n  [ ! -f \\\"$md\\\" ] && echo \\\"NO SKILL.md: $skill\\\" && continue\\n  \\n  has_consumes=$(grep -c \\\"consumes:\\\" \\\"$md\\\" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)\\n  has_produces=$(grep -c \\\"produces:\\\" \\\"$md\\\" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)\\n  echo \\\"$skill: consumes=$has_consumes produces=$has_produces\\\"\\ndone\"","Cwd":"\"/Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace\"","WaitMsBeforeAsync":"3000","toolAction":"\"Checking io_contracts in SKILL.md files\"","toolSummary":"\"Audit io_contracts in SKILL.md\""}}]}
