{"step_index":2308,"source":"MODEL","type":"PLANNER_RESPONSE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T14:56:07Z","content":"我已經寫了一支還原腳本，幫你把系統狀態徹底「恢復原樣」了！以下是具體的處理結果：\n\n### 🛠️ 剛剛完成的還原工作：\n1. **救回語音逐字稿原檔**：\n   我從被 Bug 提早推到 `smart_highlighter/input` 的檔案中，精準提取出 `<Original>`（AI 校對前的原始逐字稿內容），並把它們**還原回 `data/audio_transcriber/output/03_merged`**（共成功還原 61 份群組檔案）。\n2. **清除下游污染檔案**：\n   我把因為先前的 Router Bug 而跑到 `smart_highlighter/input`，以及我前一個對話為了應急而塞進 `proofreader/output` 的半成品檔案，**全部淨空**了。\n3. **保持 doc_parser 完整**：\n   `doc_parser` 本來就沒有受影響，所以 526 個解析檔依然完美地待在原地。\n\n---\n\n### 🚀 現在你該怎麼調整與繼續？\n\n現在整個系統已經回到了「**前置作業剛跑完，等待進入 proofreader 人工校對**」的最乾淨、最正確狀態。\n\n你現在只需要**像平常一樣啟動總管線**：\n'''bash\npython3 run_all_pipelines.py\n'''\n\n**接下來系統會自動做到：**\n1. 發現 `doc_parser` 與 `audio_transcriber` 都已經是 `✅` 完成狀態，直接跳過它們。\n2. 發現 `proofreader` 目前是 `⏳`（待處理），並立刻進入背景執行。\n3. `proofreader` 會抓取剛剛還原好的 61 份原始逐字稿，以及 526 份文件，重新生成全新的 `<Original>` 與 `<AI>` 區塊。\n4. 你只要打開 `http://localhost:8081/` Dashboard，就可以看到所有檔案乖乖排隊等你驗證了！","thinking":"**Prioritizing Tool Usage**\n\nI'm now focusing on tool selection, emphasizing specific tools over general ones where possible. The goal is to optimize efficiency by leveraging tools tailored to particular tasks, like viewing files. This strategy promises a more targeted and less error-prone approach to problem-solving, which I will continue to refine and implement moving forward.\n\n\n**Refining Command Strategies**\n\nI'm now implementing strict rules regarding tool usage, especially avoiding `cat` for file manipulation and emphasizing `grep_search`. {"step_index":2312,"source":"MODEL","type":"RUN_COMMAND","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T14:57:23Z","content":"Created At: 2026-05-29T14:57:23Z\nCompleted At: 2026-05-29T14:57:23Z\n\n\t\t\t\tThe command completed successfully.\n\t\t\t\tOutput:\n\t\t\t\timport json\nimport os\n\nstate_file = \"data/proofreader/state/.pipeline_state.json\"\n\nif os.path.exists(state_file):\n    with open(state_file) as f:\n        state = json.load(f)\n\n    for subj in state:\n        for fname in state[subj]:\n            # Reset only those that were marked as ✅ by our previous fix\n            if state[subj][fname].get(\"note\") == \"✅ 已手動修復 (從後續管線回推)\":\n                state[subj][fname][\"p1\"] = \"⏳\"\n                state[subj][fname][\"p2\"] = \"⏳\"\n                state[subj][fname][\"p3\"] = \"⏳\"\n                state[subj][fname][\"note\"] = \"Reset for regenerating intermediate files\"\n\n    with open(state_file, \"w\") as f:\n        json.dump(state, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)\n    print(\"State reset successfully.\")\n\n"}

{"step_index":2333,"source":"MODEL","type":"RUN_COMMAND","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T15:01:45Z","content":"Created At: 2026-05-29T15:01:45Z\nCompleted At: 2026-05-29T15:01:45Z\n\n\t\t\t\tThe command completed successfully.\n\t\t\t\tOutput:\n\t\t\t\t# AI Startup Protocol & Session Initialization\n\n> **Target Audience:** Development AIs (Google Antigravity, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot)\n> **Purpose:** Defines the canonical startup prompt and full execution process for every new conversation.\n> **Last Updated:** 2026-05-05\n\n---\n\n## Standard Startup Prompt (每次新對話複製貼上)\n\n> Copy and paste the following block at the beginning of every new conversation.\n\n'''\n請先讀取 identity/AI_PROFILE.md，完成以下完整 Startup Sequence：\n\n【Phase 1 — 記憶載入】\n1. 讀取 identity/AI_PROFILE.md（角色定義、操作原則、禁止行為）\n2. 讀取 memory/PROJECT_RULES.md（行為合約、硬體限制、完工流程、Code Review Checklist）\n3. 讀取 memory/HANDOFF.md（上次對話在哪裡停止）\n4. 讀取 memory/TASKS.md（目前待辦事項）\n5. 讀取 docs/STRUCTURE.md（完整專案目錄地圖）\n6. 讀取 memory/HISTORY.md（Session 索引，確認哪些已封存）\n7. 讀取 memory/DECISIONS.md（架構決策紀錄，避免推翻已有決定）\n8. 讀取 docs/CODING_GUIDELINES.md §15（AI-Native 文件系統規範）\n\n【Phase 2 — 靜態分析（自動執行）】\ncd openclaw-sandbox && ./ops/check.sh\n（涵蓋 Ruff lint + Ruff format + Mypy，覆蓋 core/ + skills/ 共 133 個檔案）\n\n【Phase 3 — 人工審查（逐項執行 PROJECT_RULES.md §6 Checklist）】\n1. 無裸露 print()\n2. 無硬編碼路徑\n3. 所有 LLM 呼叫後有 unload_model()\n4. 所有寫入使用 AtomicWriter\n5. 所有設定讀取走 config_manager\n6. DRY 合規\n7. STRUCTURE.md 與實際目錄一致\n8. HANDOFF.md 時間戳是最新的\n9. 無無引用的 # TODO\n10. 所有原則已被「✅ 原則已記錄」確認\n\n【Phase 4 — 文件同步核對】\n- git -C openclaw-sandbox status\n- git -C openclaw-sandbox log --oneline -5\n- 確認所有 .md 檔案（ARCHITECTURE.md / CHANGELOG.md / STRUCTURE.md）已反映最新狀態\n\n【Phase\n<truncated 2842 bytes>\n']w[\\\"']\" core/ skills/\n\n# 5. 所有設定讀取走 config_manager\ngrep -rn \"yaml.load\\|open.*config.yaml\" core/ skills/\n\n# 9. 無無引用的 # TODO\ngrep -rn \"# TODO\" core/ skills/\n'''\n\n其餘項目（6 DRY、7 目錄一致、8 時間戳、10 原則確認）為語意審查，不依賴 grep。\n\n---\n\n### Phase 4 — 文件同步核對 (SSoT Verification)\n\n'''bash\ngit -C openclaw-sandbox status\ngit -C openclaw-sandbox log --oneline -5\n'''\n\n逐一核對：\n- `docs/STRUCTURE.md` 是否反映實際目錄結構\n- `CHANGELOG.md` 是否記錄最近的變更\n- `skills/<skill>/SKILL.md` 是否已過時\n- `memory/HANDOFF.md` 的 `Last Updated` 是否為今日\n\n---\n\n### Phase 5 — Continuous Principle Sync\n\n- 掃描 `memory/sessions/` 中最新的 Session 檔案\n- 提取任何在對話中出現但尚未寫入 md 的原則\n- 路由到正確的 md 檔案（依照 `AI_PROFILE.md` 的路由表）\n- 每條原則必須以以下格式確認：\n  > `✅ 原則已記錄 → [target_file.md]：<rule content>`\n\n---\n\n### End-of-Session 完工流程\n\n'''\n1. check.sh    → 確保 ✅ All checks passed\n2. 更新所有相關 md 檔案\n3. git add -A && git commit -m \"...\" && git push   ← 先推\n4. python3 ops/archive_session.py                   ← 推完再封存\n5. 更新 memory/HANDOFF.md & memory/TASKS.md\n'''\n\n> [!IMPORTANT]\n> `archive_session.py` 必須在 `git push` **之後**執行，否則對話尾端可能被截斷，無法完整封存。\n\n---\n\n## 原則路由表（快速參考）\n\n| 觸發情境 | 路由目標 |\n|:---|:---|\n| 操作習慣、Prompt Macro、溝通風格 | `identity/AI_PROFILE.md` |\n| 程式語法規範、命名規則、格式標準 | `docs/CODING_GUIDELINES.md` |\n| IDE 限制、執行協議、完工流程 | `memory/PROJECT_RULES.md` |\n| Sandbox Agent 倫理、邊界定義 | `openclaw-sandbox/SOUL.md` |\n| 為什麼選 X 不選 Y（架構決策） | `memory/DECISIONS.md` |\n| 目錄結構、資料路徑、核心模組變更 | `docs/STRUCTURE.md` |\n| CLI 介面、使用者操作說明 | `skills/<skill>/SKILL.md` |\n\n"}

{"step_index":2339,"source":"USER_EXPLICIT","type":"USER_INPUT","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T15:03:11Z","content":"<USER_REQUEST>\n請執行對話結束流程，所有步驟完成後才能回報完成：\n\n【Step 1 — Continuous Principle Sync】\n掃描本次對話，提取所有新原則或操作習慣。\n依 memory/PROJECT_RULES.md §4 的路由表，將每條新原則寫入對應 md 檔案。\n以「✅ 原則已記錄 → [file]：<內容>」格式逐條確認。\n若無新原則，明確回報「無新原則需記錄」。\n\n【Step 2 — 動態 MD 掃描與更新】\n先執行「靜態清單核對」，再執行「動態發現核對」：\n\n▌靜態清單（每次必查，回報每項是否需要更新）：\n- memory/HANDOFF.md      — 本次完成了什麼、系統現狀（Current Session 區塊）、Next Session Starting Point、Current System State 表格\n- memory/TASKS.md        — 完成項目打 ✅、新增待辦\n- memory/HISTORY.md      — 確認最新 session 已有正確 [Archived] 標題（由 archive_session.py 自動寫入，此步僅確認）\n- openclaw-sandbox/CHANGELOG.md — 有功能/修復才記錄（Conventional Commits 格式）\n- identity/AI_PROFILE.md — 有新溝通偏好或 Prompt Macro 才更新\n- memory/PROJECT_RULES.md — 有新 IDE 限制或 End-of-Task 協定才更新\n\n▌動態發現（根據本次對話內容判斷，涉及哪些就更新哪些）：\n- 新增/刪除/搬移 檔案或目錄         → docs/STRUCTURE.md + docs/INDEX.md\n- 架構決策、模組關係變動             → docs/ARCHITECTURE.md\n- 新的架構決策（Why X over Y）       → memory/DECISIONS.md + skills/<skill>/docs/DECISIONS.md\n- 資料路徑、Phase 邏輯、核心模組變動 → docs/STRUCTURE.md + skills/<skill>/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md\n- CLI 介面或使用者操作流程變動       → skills/<skill>/SKILL.md + docs/USER_MANUAL.md\n- 新的程式設計標準或 Code Pattern    → docs/CODING_GUIDELINES.md\n- Sandbox Agent 倫理邊界變動        → openclaw-sandbox/SOUL.md 或 IDENTITY.md\n\n每個檔案處理後，回報：\n  ✅ [filepath]：已更新（<變動摘要>）\n  ⏭️ [filepath]：無需更新\n\n【Step 3 — 品質驗證】\n從 local-workspace/ 根目錄執行：\n  ./ops/check.sh\n\n必須顯示 ✅ All global checks passed 才能繼續。\n若有錯誤，先修復後再繼續。\n\n【Step 4 — 版本控制】\ngit add -A\ngit commit -m \"<conventional commit message 總結本次所有變更>\"\ngit push\n回報 commit hash 與 push 狀態。\n\n【Step 5 — 封存】\n從 local-workspace/ 根目錄執行：\n  python3 ops/archive_session.py\n\n（必須在 git push 之後執行，確保最終 commit hash 被納入封存）\n\n完成後回報：\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n✅ 原則已記錄（逐條列出，或「無新原則」）\n✅ 所有 md 已同步（靜態清單 + 動態發現，各自列出處理結果）\n✅ check.sh 通過（All global checks passed）\n✅ Git 已推送（commit hash: xxxxxxx）\n✅ Session 已封存（memory/sessions/YYYY-MM-DD_xxxxxxxx.md）\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n</USER_REQUEST>\n<ADDITIONAL_METADATA>\nThe current local time is: 2026-05-29T23:03:11+08:00.\n</ADDITIONAL_METADATA>"}

fixed archive timing order\n\n\n\n---\n\n## 🔴 High Priority (阻斷性問題 / 核心功能)\n\n*(None currently)*\n\n---\n\n## 🟡 Medium Priority (優化 / 非緊急功能)\n\n- [ ] Populate `tests/` with E2E and integration test stubs per CODING_GUIDELINES §11.2\n- [ ] Run live end-to-end pipeline test with new `qwen3:14b` routing: `.m4a` / `.mp4` → `data/wiki/`\n- [ ] Rebuild ChromaDB index and validate a Telegram RAG query with `gemma4:e4b`\n- [ ] Phase B (Memory & Graph RAG): ChromaDB + NetworkX deep integration\n- [ ] **Code Review 待修復 (Phase 4)**: 清理裸露的 `print()` (共 8 處，改用 log_manager)。\n- [ ] **Code Review 待修復 (Phase 4)**: 檢查 22 個呼叫 LLM 的檔案是否都有落實 `unload_model()`。\n- [ ] **Code Review 待修復 (Phase 4)**: 修正 `router_agent.py` 與 `file_utils.py` 中的 `open(..., \"w\")`，改用 `AtomicWriter`。\n---\n\n## 🟢 Low Priority (技術債 / 探索性研究)\n\n- [ ] Register any future OCR service in `BOOTSTRAP.md` if/when needed\n- [ ] Evaluate `CONTRIBUTING.md` guidelines if workspace becomes multi-contributor\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Completed\n\n- [x] 2026-05-29: Eager Execution & HITL Verification Hardening\n  - Fixed RouterAgent eager chain index routing to ensure pre-HITL versions safely copy to smart_highlighter.\n  - Prepended `proofreader` to In\n<truncated 4202 bytes>\n.py` bare imports → `from core.path_builder`\n  - Fixed `p05_synthesis.py` and `p03_synthesis.py` output path: `data/raw/` → `data/wiki/`\n  - Added `watchdog>=4.0.0` and `requests>=2.31.0` to `requirements.txt`\n  - Removed `flask>=3.0.0` from `requirements.txt`; installed `watchdog 6.0.0`\n\n- [x] 2026-04-19: Phase 6 Final Cleanup\n  - Removed Flask Web UI — orchestration now native to Open Claw\n  - Fixed `SyntaxError` + duplicate method + wrong output path in `p05_synthesis.py`\n  - Upgraded `inbox_daemon` to recursive subject-folder routing with triple PDF modes\n  - Created `core/inbox_config.json` with 42 routing rules + inline descriptions\n  - Created `skills/inbox_manager/` skill with CLI for runtime rule management\n\n- [x] 2026-04-19: Antigravity Deep Thought Hotfixes (P0/P1/P2)\n  - `inbox_daemon`: 300 s timeout + `stop_event` guard; debounce via `threading.Event`\n  - `state_manager`: `fcntl.flock` to prevent concurrent JSON corruption\n  - `cli_runner`: `PathBuilder` path resolution hardened\n\n- [x] 2026-04-19: Full 4-Skill WebUI + CLI Integration\n  - `core/cli_runner.py` (SkillRunner service layer)\n  - `execution_manager.py` — Job Queue + same-skill deduplication\n  - Extended `smart_highlighter` and `note_generator` CLIs with `--input-file` / `--output-file`\n\n- [x] 2026-04-19: `smart_highlighter` and `note_generator` extracted as standalone skills\n\n- [x] 2026-04-19: Global `.md` documentation update pass\n- [x] 2026-04-19: Global `memory/` directory established (monorepo root + sandbox)\n- [x] 2026-04-19: `ops/check.sh` quality gate created\n\n- [x] 2026-04-18: `CODING_GUIDELINES.md` v3.0.0 consolidated and published\n- [x] 2026-04-18: `INFRA_SETUP.md` updated to Version 9\n- [x] 2026-04-18: `doc_parser` phase naming refactored (`p01a` → `p00a`, etc.)\n- [x] 2026-04-18: `.gitignore` updated to exclude runtime files\n\n- [x] 2026-04-15: `core/` shared framework established\n- [x] 2026-04-15: `audio_transcriber` refactored to 6-phase MLX-Whisper pipeline\n- [x] 2026-04-15: `doc_parser` 7-phase pipeline implemented\n\n"}

{"step_index":2416,"source":"MODEL","type":"RUN_COMMAND","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-29T15:13:34Z","content":"Created At: 2026-05-29T15:13:34Z\nCompleted At: 2026-05-29T15:13:34Z\n\n\t\t\t\tThe command completed successfully.\n\t\t\t\tOutput:\n\t\t\t\timport os\nimport glob\nimport datetime\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\ndef archive_current_session():\n    brain_dir = os.path.expanduser(\"~/.gemini/antigravity/brain/\")\n    sessions_dir = \"memory/sessions\"\n    os.makedirs(sessions_dir, exist_ok=True)\n    \n    # Find the most recently modified session in the brain\n    latest_dir = None\n    latest_time = 0\n    for d in glob.glob(os.path.join(brain_dir, \"*\")):\n        if os.path.isdir(d):\n            overview_path = os.path.join(d, \".system_generated/logs/overview.txt\")\n            if os.path.exists(overview_path):\n                mtime = os.path.getmtime(overview_path)\n                if mtime > latest_time:\n                    latest_time = mtime\n                    latest_dir = d\n                    \n    if not latest_dir:\n        print(\"No active AI session found.\")\n        return\n\n    short_uuid = os.path.basename(latest_dir)[:8]\n    date_str = datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp(latest_time).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')\n    \n    plan_file = os.path.join(latest_dir, \"implementation_plan.md\")\n    walk_file = os.path.join(latest_dir, \"walkthrough.md\")\n    task_file = os.path.join(latest_dir, \"task.md\")\n    overview_file = os.path.join(latest_dir, \".system_generated/logs/overview.txt\")\n    \n    plan_content = Path(plan_file).read_text() if os.path.exists(plan_file) else \"*(No Implementation Plan)*\"\n    walk_content = Path(walk_file).read_text() if os.path.exists(walk_file) else \"*(No Walkthrough)*\"\n    task_content = Path(task_file).read_text() if os.path.exists(task_file) else \"*(No Task List)*\"\n    transcript = Path(overview_file).read_text() if os.path.exists(overview_file) else \"\"\n    \n    title = f\"Session {short_uuid}\"\n    if os.path.exists(plan_file):\n        lines = plan_content.split('\\n')\n        for line in lines:\n            if line.startswith('# '):\n                title = line.replace('# ', '').strip()\n                break\n    \n    if title.startswith('Implementation Plan'):\n        title = title.replace('Implementation Plan', '').strip('-: ')\n    \n    filename = f\"{date_str}_{short_uuid}.md\"\n    out_path = os.path.join(sessions_dir, filename)\n    \n    content = f\"\"\"# {title}\n\n> **Date:** {date_str}\n> **Session ID:** `{short_uuid}`\n\n---\n\n## 1. Implementation Plan\n\n{plan_content}\n\n---\n\n## 2. Walkthrough / Summary\n\n{walk_content}\n\n---\n\n## 3. Tasks Executed\n\n{task_content}\n\n---\n\n## 4. Raw Conversation Transcript\n\n<details>\n<summary>Click to expand full conversation log</summary>\n\n'''text\n{transcript.replace(''''', \"'''\")}\n'''\n</details>\n\"\"\"\n    with open(out_path, 'w') as f:\n        f.write(content)\n    \n    # Update HISTORY.md if not already there\n    history_path = \"memory/HISTORY.md\"\n    if os.path.exists(history_path):\n        history_content = Path(history_path).read_text()\n        entry = f\"- **[{date_str}] [[Archived] {title}](sessions/{filename})** (ID: `{short_uuid}`)\"\n        if entry not in history_content:\n            with open(history_path, 'a') as f:\n                f.write(entry + \"\\n\")\n                \n    print(f\"Session {short_uuid} archived to {out_path} and HISTORY.md updated.\")\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    archive_current_session()\n\n"}
